case_title: JOAN FRASER-SANTE VS. LEARNFRAME, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRASER-SANTE, JOAN AS TO DEFENDANT LEARNFRAME, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRASER-SANTE, JOAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEARNFRAME, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION $77,431.85 PRINCIPAL, $1,364.64 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $79,020.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
